steps.title: Interpret the point
steps.content: The graph passes through $(0,14)$. That means when $x=0$, the function value is $14$.

steps.title: Identify the function value
steps.content:
Since the question asks for $f(0)$, use the $y$-value from the point with $x=0$:
$$f(0)=14$$
The answer is C.
